description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a muscular build, featuring a defined chest and arm musculature. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted shirt and slim pants, both of which accentuate the athletic physique. The arms are extended outward, and the hands are relaxed with slightly curved fingers. The figure wears low-cut shoes that contrast with the rest of the outfit. The head is oval-shaped with minimal facial detail, and the hair is closely cropped. The overall appearance suggests a modern, active individual suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylized, athletic adult figure in fitted casual clothing with extended arms and low-cut shoes, featuring a defined muscular build and minimal facial detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular chest, extended arms, and full frontal details of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the slim fit of the clothing along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and the back of the head, with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the fit of the clothing from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted shirt and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
